title: cynoglossospermum affine
intro: Cynoglossospermum affine, also known as African sour plum, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossospermum affine include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
